all.en: We are pleased to invite you to the Asia Pacific Logistics Summit 2026.
all.zh: 我們很高興邀請您參加 2026 亞太物流高峰會。

all.en: The conference will take place from June 14 to June 16 in Singapore.
all.zh: 本會議將於 6 月 14 日至 6 月 16 日在新加坡舉行。

all.en: This year marks the tenth anniversary of our flagship industry event.
all.zh: 今年是我們旗艦級產業活動的十週年。

all.en: More than four thousand professionals from over sixty countries are expected.
all.zh: 預計將有來自六十多個國家、超過四千名專業人士出席。

all.en: The theme of the summit is Resilient Supply Chains in a Changing World.
all.zh: 本次高峰會主題為「變動世界中的韌性供應鏈」。

all.en: Keynote speakers include executives from leading global shipping companies.
all.zh: 主題講者包括全球領先航運公司的高階主管。

all.en: Featured topics include green logistics, automation, and cross-border trade.
all.zh: 重點議題包括綠色物流、自動化與跨境貿易。

all.en: Each day begins with a plenary session at the Marina Bay Convention Centre.
all.zh: 每日活動將於濱海灣會議中心的全體大會揭開序幕。

all.en: Afternoon panels will be held in eight breakout rooms on the second floor.
all.zh: 下午的座談會將於二樓的八間分組會議室舉行。

all.en: Attendees may also join guided tours of the new automated container terminal.
all.zh: 與會者亦可參加新建自動化貨櫃碼頭的導覽行程。

all.en: The exhibition hall will feature over two hundred technology vendors.
all.zh: 展覽廳將有超過兩百家科技廠商參展。

all.en: Live demonstrations of warehouse robotics will run throughout the event.
all.zh: 倉儲機器人現場示範將在整個活動期間進行。

all.en: A networking reception is scheduled for the evening of June 14.
all.zh: 歡迎酒會安排於 6 月 14 日傍晚舉行。

all.en: The gala dinner on June 15 will recognize this year's industry award winners.
all.zh: 6 月 15 日的晚宴將表揚本年度產業大獎得主。

all.en: Early bird registration is available until April 30 at a discounted rate.
all.zh: 早鳥報名優惠開放至 4 月 30 日截止。

all.en: Group bookings of five or more delegates receive an additional ten percent off.
all.zh: 五人以上團體報名可再享九折優惠。

all.en: Registration includes daily lunches, refreshments, and all session materials.
all.zh: 報名費含每日午餐、茶點與所有議程資料。

all.en: A complimentary shuttle will operate between partner hotels and the venue.
all.zh: 合作飯店與會場之間將提供免費接駁車。

all.en: Simultaneous interpretation will be provided in English, Mandarin, and Japanese.
all.zh: 現場將提供英語、華語與日語同步口譯。

all.en: We kindly ask delegates to confirm their attendance by May 20.
all.zh: 請與會者於 5 月 20 日前確認出席。

all.en: Visa support letters are available upon request from our secretariat.
all.zh: 如有需要，可向大會秘書處申請簽證邀請函。

all.en: Sponsorship opportunities at three tiers remain open until April 15.
all.zh: 三種等級的贊助方案開放至 4 月 15 日。

all.en: For inquiries, please contact our team at summit@aplogistics.org.
all.zh: 如有任何問題，請洽 summit@aplogistics.org。

all.en: We look forward to welcoming you to a productive and memorable summit.
all.zh: 我們期待迎接您共度一場豐碩且難忘的高峰會。

all.en: A digital event app will allow delegates to schedule one-on-one meetings with peers.
all.zh: 專屬活動行動應用程式可讓與會者預約與同業的一對一會談。

all.en: Special workshops on artificial intelligence in freight forwarding will run on June 16.
all.zh: 6 月 16 日將舉辦人工智慧應用於貨運承攬的專題工作坊。

all.en: Student passes are available at a reduced rate to encourage emerging talent in the industry.
all.zh: 本會提供學生優惠票價，以鼓勵業界新興人才參與。

all.en: All sessions will be recorded and made available to registered delegates for ninety days.
all.zh: 所有議程將進行錄影，並於會後九十天內提供已報名與會者觀看。

all.en: An exclusive site visit to the regional distribution hub can be added during registration.
all.zh: 報名時可加購獨家區域配送中心參訪行程。

all.en: Press credentials are available to qualified journalists through the media accreditation page.
all.zh: 符合資格的媒體記者可透過媒體採訪登記頁面申請採訪證。

all.en: Mentorship pairings will connect senior leaders with younger professionals throughout the week.
all.zh: 活動期間將安排資深領袖與新進專業人士的師徒配對。

all.en: Sustainability commitments include carbon-neutral shipping for all conference materials.
all.zh: 永續承諾包括所有會議資料採用碳中和的方式運送。

all.en: Detailed agendas in multiple languages will be circulated to confirmed delegates next week.
all.zh: 多語版本的詳細議程將於下週寄送給已確認出席的代表。

all.en: Warm regards from the organizing committee of the Asia Pacific Logistics Summit.
all.zh: 亞太物流高峰會籌備委員會敬上。

all.en: Pre-summit briefing webinars will be offered free of charge to registered participants in early June.
all.zh: 六月上旬將為已報名參加者免費提供高峰會前的線上簡報。

all.en: A startup showcase pavilion will feature thirty promising logistics technology companies from across the region.
all.zh: 新創展示館將呈現來自區域內三十家具潛力的物流科技公司。

all.en: Networking lunches are organized by industry vertical to facilitate meaningful peer-to-peer business conversations.
all.zh: 聯誼午餐依產業類別安排，以促進有意義的同業商務交流。

all.en: Delegates may submit topic suggestions for next year's summit agenda through the official feedback form.
all.zh: 與會者可透過官方回饋表單提交明年高峰會議程的主題建議。

all.en: Wellness sessions including morning yoga and guided meditation are open to all attendees during the event.
all.zh: 活動期間，包括晨間瑜伽與引導冥想在內的健康課程開放所有與會者參加。

all.en: Volunteer opportunities allow professionals to support summit operations in exchange for complimentary registration.
all.zh: 志工機會讓專業人士可協助會議運作，以換取免費報名資格。

all.en: A regional logistics innovation report will be released exclusively at the opening ceremony of the summit.
all.zh: 區域物流創新報告將於高峰會開幕式獨家發布。

all.en: Hybrid attendance options are available for those unable to travel to Singapore in person this year.
all.zh: 本年度提供混合式出席選項，方便無法親赴新加坡的人士參與。

all.en: Group photographs of all sessions will be posted to the summit website within forty-eight hours daily.
all.zh: 所有議程的合照將每日於四十八小時內上傳至高峰會網站。

all.en: Thank you for considering this invitation, and we look forward to your confirmed participation soon.
all.zh: 感謝您考量本邀請，期待您盡快確認出席。

all.en: My boss told me to register early because last year the early bird discount expired during her lunch break.
all.zh: 我老闆叫我早點報名，因為去年早鳥優惠剛好在她吃午餐時就截止了。

all.en: I always pack two pairs of comfortable shoes for these summits, since the convention halls are huge.
all.zh: 我每次參加這種高峰會都帶兩雙好走的鞋，因為會場真的超級大。

all.en: Have you ever spent an entire conference day collecting business cards you forgot to follow up on later?
all.zh: 你有沒有試過在會議裡收了一整天名片，事後完全忘記要後續聯絡？

all.en: My favorite part is honestly the coffee breaks, since that is when the real industry gossip gets shared.
all.zh: 我最喜歡的其實是中場休息時間，因為真正的業界八卦都是那時候在傳。

all.en: Singapore in June is really humid, so I am already buying lightweight shirts for the conference week.
all.zh: 六月的新加坡真的很潮濕，我已經開始買輕薄襯衫準備那週穿。

all.en: I once attended a logistics summit and ended up sharing a taxi with a major client by complete chance.
all.zh: 我有一次參加物流高峰會，碰巧跟一個大客戶共乘計程車。

all.en: My colleague signed up for the morning yoga session, which honestly surprised everyone who knows him personally.
all.zh: 我同事居然報名了晨間瑜伽，認識他的人都嚇了一跳。

all.en: Honestly, the gala dinner outfit is always my biggest stress, since I never know how formal to actually go.
all.zh: 說真的，晚宴要穿什麼一直是我最大的壓力，因為很難拿捏要多正式。

all.en: I plan to bring printed business cards even though everyone keeps insisting QR codes are the future.
all.zh: 我打算帶實體名片，雖然大家一直說 QR 碼才是未來趨勢。

all.en: My team is splitting the workshops so we cover more sessions and compare notes back at the hotel each night.
all.zh: 我們團隊會分頭參加不同工作坊，這樣涵蓋範圍更廣，晚上回飯店再交換筆記。
